noisy_examples.source: corpus cornell No, no, it's my fault -- we didn't have a proper introduction ---
corpus cornell Gosh, if only we could find Kat a boyfriend...
noisy_examples.target: Let me see what I can do.

noisy_examples.target: Okay... then how 'bout we try out some French cuisine.  Saturday?  Night?
